center.name: 孙德尔本斯
center.summary: 孙德尔本斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mangrove whistler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The mangrove whistler (Pachycephala cinerea) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae found in South-east Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The mangrove whistler (Pachycephala cinerea) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae found in South-east Asia
